title: Aptech South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aptech South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
